# Technology Stack

## Purpose

This document summarizes the technology stack used by Praxis360.

For architecture details, see:

- Docs/Architecture.md

---

## Framework

- .NET 10
- .NET MAUI
- Blazor Hybrid

---

## Language

- C#
- Latest stable language features

---

## Architecture

- Service-based architecture
- Dependency Injection
- Reusable Shared Components
- Modular design
- Mobile-first

---

## User Interface

- Razor Components
- CSS Isolation
- Reusable UI Components

The complete Design System is documented in:

- Docs/DesignBible.md
- Docs/MotionGuide.md

---

## Data

Current

- In-memory Services

Future

- Local storage
- Cloud synchronization
- Microsoft Graph
- Secure APIs

---

## Development Environment

- Visual Studio 2026
- Git
- GitHub
- GitHub Copilot Agent

---

## Development Priorities

Always prefer:

- Existing project architecture
- Existing components
- Existing Services

Avoid introducing new frameworks or libraries unless clearly justified.

---

## Future Technologies

Planned evolution includes:

- OCR
- AI Assistant
- Cloud Synchronization
- Notifications
- Multi-device synchronization
- Automated Testing
- CI/CD

---
